---
title: "Agnes Baker"
---

## Agnes Baker

**Dates:** (b.1863/4)

### Description

teacher

### Biography

This person teaching Joanna Yonge is probably to be identified as Agnes Baker (b.1863/4), daughter of the Rev. James Baker of Clifton Lodge, Winchester, who is described, like her sister Emily (b. 1858/9) in the 1891 census as a Teacher of Music.

### Letters

- Letter from June 1st [?1886]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
